title: Unibot - REKT
relevance_summary: Approval exploit on trading bot router contract allowing transferFrom() calls to drain approved tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls transferFrom() on router contract after user approval

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls transferFrom() on router contract after user approval
summary: Unibot's new router contract was exploited due to a lack of input validation, allowing attackers to drain approved tokens. A guard could have blocked transactions calling transferFrom() on the router contract after user approval.
